items.title: Liverpool's latest collapse leaves Champions Leagu...
items.summary: Liverpool were looking to secure a spot in the Champions League next season. But because of their loss to Aston Villa, they will need to sweat it out to qualify for it next week.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Dodgers' Blake Snell Set for Elbow Surgery, Expected Back Later this Season
items.summary: Dodgers RHP Blake Snell will undergo surgery in his left elbow this Tuesday, and is expected to return later this season.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Gill: 'We didn't deserve to win this one'
items.summary: GT dropped four catches, three of them sitters with Allen, Raghuvanshi and Green all benefiting from the chances
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
